callGraph.callee:
existingEvents
          .filter(e => (e as any).stageId === c.stageId && ((e as any).size ?? null) === c.size && e.occurredOn.start === c.day)
          .map

functions.name: MonthlyEntryGrid
params:
{
  onDirtyChange,
  customFields,
  grain,
  anchorDate,
  onAnchorChange,
  blockedReason,
}

callGraph.callee:
records
      .filter((r) => r.checked || r.acceptedGood || r.rework || r.rejected || r.defects.length > 0)
      .map

reg.stages
    .filter((s) => (s.effectiveFrom == null || s.effectiveFrom <= isoDate) &&
                   (s.effectiveTo == null || isoDate <= s.effectiveTo))
    .map
